film.title: Youngistaan
film.overview: Abhimanyu Kaul - a young, independent, Games Developer, living in Japan and the love of his life, Anwita Chauhan - a bubbly, passionate and full of life, summer intern. Their happy and content life faces the test of time, when blood ties and the pressure of being born into the first family of India tears a young Abhimanyu between his love for Anwita and a promise made to his dying father, the Prime Minister of India. Being a public figure, by reluctantly accepting to represent the governing party, much against his own wishes and at the cost of his private life, is a double-edged sword that Abhimanyu must walk on.

dialogues.dialogue: What else can you expect from a 28-year-old boy? So what, madam? I too stay with my girlfriend. Abhimanyu Kaul.. - Shame on you! Shame on you! The situation there will be a little heated up, sir. Be careful.
Where's Anvi? At home. Bring her out. Bring that shameless out. Bring her out. Bring that shameless out. Bring her out. Bring that insolent out.
dialogues.cause_raw: Being labeled as shameless and insolent

dialogues.dialogue: At home. Bring her out. Bring that shameless out. Bring her out. Bring that shameless out. Bring her out. Bring that insolent out. Driver, be careful.
dialogues.cause_raw: being labeled as shameless and insolent

dialogues.dialogue: Bring her out. Bring that insolent out. Driver, be careful. Bring her out. Bring that insolent out. Stop this shamelessness. Anvi..It's okay. Don't take so much stress. Go to Japan for a few days.

I become the Deputy Prime Minister. Who's next? It makes me very proud that I've been asked to invite.....a 28-year-old man representing a 3000-year-old civilization. To address this esteemed gathering of nations. Please welcome, the Honorable Prime Minister of India..Mr. Abhimanyu Kaul.
